_doc: Triaged npm-audit advisories. scripts/audit-gate.mjs fails the build for any high/critical advisory NOT listed here (each needs a reason + expiry), and for any listed entry past its expiry, so triage decisions cannot rot silently. As of 2026-06-14 this list is empty: the Next.js 14 SERVER advisories that used to live here were FIXED by upgrading to next@16 (the production audit now has no high/critical). Two moderate, build-time advisories remain (postcss CSS-stringify XSS, reached only during the build) - below this gate's high/critical threshold.
